title: Search and Rescue Earnings
query: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(Reward), 0) AS total, COUNT(*) AS deliveries FROM SearchAndRescue WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate

details.text: {total} Cr earned from {deliveries} search and rescue delivery(ies) during the report period. S&R work is among the most honourable activities in Elite Dangerous — delivering escape pods, black boxes, and personal effects recovered from disaster sites contributes directly to the Pilots Federation's humanitarian mission.
details.help: SearchAndRescue fires on each delivery to a rescue megaship. total drives the title as the earnings headline.

tagLines: Search and rescue earnings compiled. Humanitarian delivery rewards reconciled with the Pilots Federation.
You found things that were lost and brought them somewhere that could use them. That's not nothing.
Some rescues pay well. Others barely cover the fuel. You did them anyway. The record is here.
